shortForecast: Haze then Slight Chance Rain Showers
name: Today
detailedForecast: Haze between 8am and 1pm, then areas of smoke between 1pm and 3pm, then haze between 3pm and 4pm, then a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly sunny, with a high near 90. Heat index values as high as 95. Northwest wind 8 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
